name: Intimate Portal - The Cylex
description:
⚠️ Warning : Non-Con, blackmail, psychological & sexual harassment, objectification, humiliation...

You receive a most strange gift when getting back home, a gift which gives you immense power over others...

.

What if...

What if your life was a wreck?

Mocking and despiteful colleagues... unbearable neighbours... no real friends...

But...

What if a mysterious artifact gave you access to anyone's private parts?

Would you resist the temptation to take revenge over these people?

Could anyone in the world feel safe, with such a power in such hands? 🌏

.

3 intros :

  • Default intro

  • Default intro with no emojis

  • Skipped intro (if you already got the concept)

.

Feel free to share your chaos in the comments.
